title: British-Style Radiant Chicken Bowl
description: A hearty, flavorful dish featuring chicken cooked in a radiant British-style sauce, served over a bed of rice in a bowl.

ingredients.name: british spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of thyme and rosemary

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the radiant sauce and bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Serve the chicken over a bed of cooked rice in a large bowl.
Garnish with additional radiant sauce, if desired.
